label: 第93話
source_locator: 単行本11巻 目次 p.91
summary_short: 真人は虎杖を先に見つけた者が殺すという競争を漏瑚たちへ提案する。虎杖は七海班と合流し、五条救出のため帳を解く役割分担を決める。
summary_full: 真人は、先に虎杖を見つけた者が自分の目的を実行するという競争を提案する。漏瑚は宿儺復活、真人と脹相は虎杖殺害を目的に別行動へ移る。枷場美々子と菜々子は羂索へ夏油の肉体を返すよう要求するが拒まれる。虎杖は七海・伏黒・猪野と合流し、小型メカ丸の情報を共有。五条を奪還するには獄門疆を持つ敵へ近づく必要があるため、まず術師の侵入を阻む帳を解除する方針を決める。七海は伊地知や補助監督の状況確認へ向かい、三人へ帳の基点探索を任せる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Against 漏瑚 's best judgement, 真人 decides to turn hunting 虎杖悠仁 into a game amongst their team. Meanwhile, Team 七海 regroups with 悠仁 and formulate a plan to rescue 五条悟 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 真人 turns his disagreement on how to handle 悠仁 into a friendly competition. 真人 agrees with 脹相 and suggests they kill 虎杖悠仁. Even if they don't fully resurrect 宿儺 , 真人 is confident that the 呪霊 can still overwhelm humanity. Annoyed, 漏瑚 asks if 真人 is being serious and he replies that he's for real . 漏瑚 recalls 真人 saying that it doesn't matter if they're smiling in the end as long as 宿儺 can make curses emerge as the true humans. 漏瑚 knows that 宿儺 isn't their ally and could cause them all to suffer but the era of curses will still surely come regardless. He believes curses do not fear death and can walk their paths sincerely to achieve their goals. 真人 argues that even if a 呪霊 is inconsistent along that path, they still live according to their desires. He acknowledges reviving 宿儺 is a legitimate strategy but 真人 doesn't want to fight 漏瑚 over it. Instead, 真人 turns it into a game. If he encounters 悠仁 first—he'll kill him—and if 漏瑚 finds him first, he can use the fingers to restore 宿儺's power. 美々子 and 菜々子 demand their master's body be returned. 脹相 adds that if he finds 悠仁 he will try to kill him as well. This annoys 漏瑚 but 真人 is excited to see that 脹相 wants to play too. Pseudo-夏油 decides to pass and stay behind with 獄門疆 . He feels that reviving 宿儺 is more of a contingency plan in case sealing 五条悟 is ever compromised. 漏瑚 interrupts and argues that it's the smartest strategy for all of them to remain in place with 夏油 and wait for 悠仁 and all the sorcerers to come to them. However, 真人, 脹相, and even 陀艮 run away once the "game" starts, ignoring 漏瑚. Determined not to let them find 悠仁 first, 漏瑚 runs off as well and inadvertently decides to take part, amusing 夏油. 夏油 notices 美々子 and 菜々子 watching him and says the curses are smarter than them. The girls are hiding among the crowd of humans still in stasis from being inside 無量空処 . They state that they helped with killing monkeys and demand 夏油傑 's body back as promised. They don't want the imposter using their beloved master's body any longer. Pseudo-夏油 refuses and tells the girls they should make a 縛り whenever dealing with a sorcerer. He tells them to leave unless they want to be killed by their master's body. They disappear into the crowd and claim he'll regret this, but the imposter responds with a claim that it's been so long he's forgotten what regret feels like. 猪野, 悠仁, and 恵 move out to disable the curtain blocking out sorcerers. Meanwhile, 悠仁 stands on top of a building in 渋谷 and continues yelling for "Nanamin". The 七海 Team finds him and 恵 slaps 悠仁 in the back of the head to stop him from yelling. 悠仁 and メカ丸 bring Team 七海 completely up to speed as far as the situation revolving around 五条. 七海 doesn't quite understand how 夏油 is involved and メカ丸 explains it's technically an imposter acting as 夏油. 渋谷駅 is in a state of pandemonium currently.  七海 agrees coordinating an attack from the adjacent stations makes sense for a battle plan, but in order for it work they must lift the curtain first. 七海 asks 猪野 to take the first-years and lower the curtain prohibiting sorcerers from entering the station. As a grade 1 jujutsu sorcerer, there are certain procedures only he can oversee. He's going to head outside the curtain and meet with 伊地知 . Additionally, 七海 wants 猪野 to pass along any information to Team 日下部 and Team 禪院 if he encounters them. " We'll save 五条悟!! " After the grade 1 sorcerer leaves, 猪野 gets the "feels" because 七海 is relying on him. Impassioned, 猪野 debriefs 恵 and 悠仁 so they understand the severity of failure in this situation. If 五条悟 disappears, the 五条家 falls out of power and anyone like 悠仁 who's being protected will be targeted by the jujutsu high ups again. Sorcerers in the community will fight for political power and while they're doing that, all the curses and curse users that were held back by 五条's presence will attack. Sorcerers squabbling over politics will surely lose into a war to those two groups. This means if the jujutsu high sorcerers fail here in 渋谷, the age of humans will surely be over in Japan. 悠仁 and 恵 both confirm they understand what's at stake. 猪野 tells them it's time to move out. He plans on having the curtain down before 七海 returns and believes they'll save 五条悟! Meanwhile, on top of 渋谷 Tower, three curse users watch over the commissioned curtains. They're excited to hear 五条悟 has been sealed. The old man, 粟坂二良 wonders how this will affect Japan. The old woman, オガミ , replies that nothing will change. Curse users will curse and the cursed will die.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 脹相 漏瑚 真人 陀艮 Pseudo-夏油 美々子 菜々子 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 七海建人 与幸吉 (傀儡) 猪野琢真 日下部篤也 パンダ 粟坂二良 オガミ
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 渋谷 渋谷駅 副都心線 ホーム 渋谷駅 副都心線 ホーム 副都心線 ホーム
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 結界 術式 帳 呪物 嘱託式の帳 獄門疆

key_events_verified_phase5: 真人が虎杖を巡る競争を提案する
美々子と菜々子が夏油の肉体返還を要求する
虎杖が七海・伏黒・猪野と合流する
五条奪還の前段として帳解除を決める
verification_notes_phase5: 集英社公式10・11巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第五段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
